name: brca_gene_attention
notes: Transformer encoder treating each gene as a sequence token. Each gene i becomes a d_model=64 embedding via value_proj(x_i) + gene_emb_i, where gene_emb_i is a learnable per-gene identity vector. 2-layer TransformerEncoder (4 heads) is followed by mean-pooling and a linear Cox head. top_k_genes=2000 with batch_size=32; full self-attention is O(n^2) so at n=2000 each attention matrix is 4M entries — expect ~2 GB GPU memory per layer at float32. If OOM, reduce batch_size to 8 or 16. dropout reduced to 0.1 from the MLP default as Transformer dropout acts on attention weights and FFN, providing its own regularization.
